name: metrics.getSummary
description: Get real-time metrics summary with 30s cache TTL, providing PRD KPI targets: behavior reuse (70%), token savings (30%), task completion (80%), compliance coverage (95%). Faster than analytics.kpiSummary for dashboard updates.

start_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter results from this date forward

end_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter results up to this date

use_cache.description: Whether to use cached data (default: true). Set false to force fresh query.

snapshot_time.description: ISO timestamp when metrics were captured

behavior_reuse_pct.description: Percentage of runs citing ≥1 behavior (PRD target: 70%)

average_token_savings_pct.description: Average token reduction via BCI (PRD target: 30%)

task_completion_rate_pct.description: Percentage of runs completed successfully (PRD target: 80%)

total_runs.description: Total number of runs in the period

runs_with_behaviors.description: Runs that cited at least one behavior

total_output_tokens.description: Sum of actual output tokens consumed

cache_hit.description: Whether this result was served from cache

cache_age_seconds.description: Age of cached data in seconds (0 if fresh)
